channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-5694] There are some files that disappear. if you try to create them the operating system allows the creation of files and resets its size.
item.description:
There are some files that disappear. if you try to create them the operating system allows the creation of files and resets its size.

[wisi281@osiride-lp-019 data]$ ls -l spet
rw-rw-r- 1 b487000 finloc 0 Oct 1 14:17 1978_spet_co.csv
rw-rw-r- 1 b487000 finloc 0 Oct 1 14:18 1997_spet_co.csv

spet:
total 148728
rw-rw-r- 1 f723367 finloc 1123682 Apr 23 15:51 1978_spet_co.csv

[wisi281@osiride-lp-019 data]$ ls -l 2012_spet_co.csv
ls: cannot access 2012_spet_co.csv: No such file or directory

[wisi281@osiride-lp-019 data]$ sudo touch 2012_spet_co.csv
[wisi281@osiride-lp-019 data]$ sudo ls -l 2012_spet_co.csv
rw-rr- 1 root finloc 0 Oct 1 14:26 2012_spet_co.csv
item.environment:
Operating system
Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server release 6.4 (Santiago)
lustre
lustre-client-modules-1.8.9-2.6.32_358.el6.x86_64_g7880158.x86_64
lustre-client-1.8.9-2.6.32_358.el6.x86_64_g7880158.x86_64
item.summary: There are some files that disappear. if you try to create them the operating system allows the creation of files and resets its size.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Jnet200 Support Team,

We have not been able to reproduce this problem after several attempts.

If you would like us to continue to work on this ticket please tell us who the end-customer is, and provide more details about the files that disappear.

Many thanks,
~ jfc.

Bob

Could you please advise on this issue?

Thanks

Peter
